verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: Addæus preached at Edessa and in Mesopotamia (he was from Paneus) in the days of Abgar the king.

verses.book: Extracts from Various Books Concerning Abgar the King and Addæus the Apostle.
verses.text: And, when he was among the Zophenians, Severus the son of Abgar sent and slew him at Agel Hasna, as also a young man his disciple.
